data.body:
PASS 1 review — G6 (Approach soundness, anti-patterns & alternative-selection): CONCUR with prior G6 audits (timestamps 1782504839676544001, 1782504887776813001). Independently re-grounded this pass against the repo; all three findings hold and no new ones surfaced.

(1) MECHANISM GAP confirmed — FakeAcliClient exposes ONLY read/fetch surfaces (search_issues, get_comment_map, get_issuelinks_map, get_parent_map at tests/integration/rebar_reconciler/jira_contract/_fakes.py:50-63) and its docstring scopes it to "driving fetcher.fetch_snapshot / compute_snapshot" through the inbound enrichment merge (_fakes.py:13-17). It has no outbound/apply surface, so "story A's fixtures/fake through the production path" cannot by itself produce the local→Jira→local half a BIDIRECTIONAL round-trip requires.

(2) EXISTING-HARNESS reconciliation confirmed — tests/integration/rebar_reconciler/test_reconcile_roundtrip.py ALREADY chains the real pure differs end-to-end (module docstring lines 1-28: "These tests chain the REAL pure differs end to end against mock fixtures (no live Jira)"; convergence = "after the round-trip the inbound differ emits NO change"), covers labels/parent/comments/links identity round-trips, runs in CI (pytestmark = pytest.mark.integration, line 42), and asserts outcomes not blob equality — substantially meeting AC1 and AC4 already. The plan does not mention it.

(3) MISSING POSITIVE RATIONALE confirmed — the plan asserts the fake-through-fetch seam but states no reason why it is the right vehicle for a round-trip given the existing differ-chaining seam, leaving alternative-selection non-auditable (G6 requires a positive rationale, not a rejected-alternatives section).

AFFIRMATIONS (G6 criteria this plan satisfies):
- Fitness-for-purpose / solves-the-named-problem (de-encode half): the NOT-SYNCED/"as expected" guard is real and load-bearing at scripts/jira-pressure-test/e2e_field_validation_probe.sh:1543-1547 (doc mention at 1914); converting it to xfail/fail-when-the-gap-closes directly fixes the named defect.
- Anti-change-detector mechanism: AC4 ("check round-trip outcomes, not whole-blob equality") is the soundly-stated property and matches the convergence-assertion style already in the codebase.

No duplicate findings re-filed; the prior audits' three findings stand as the actionable coaching items.
